mapper.select:
SELECT BOARD_SEQ , SBST_CTG , BOARD_SUBJECT , BOARD_HIT_CNT , BOARD_CONTENTS FROM NMCP_BOARD_BAS WHERE BOARD_CTG_SEQ = 57 AND VIEW_YN = 'Y'
AND SBST_CTG = #{sbstCtg}
AND ( REPLACE(UPPER(BOARD_SUBJECT), ' ', '') LIKE '%' || REPLACE(UPPER(#{searchNm}), ' ', '') || '%' ESCAPE '!' OR REPLACE(UPPER(BOARD_CONTENTS), ' ', '') LIKE '%' || REPLACE(UPPER(#{searchNm}), ' ', '') || '%' ESCAPE '!' )
ORDER BY CASE WHEN REPLACE(UPPER(BOARD_SUBJECT), ' ', '') LIKE '%' || REPLACE(UPPER(#{searchNm}), ' ', '') || '%' ESCAPE '!' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, BOARD_HIT_CNT DESC

SELECT COUNT(BOARD_SEQ) FROM NMCP_BOARD_BAS WHERE BOARD_CTG_SEQ = 57 AND VIEW_YN = 'Y' AND BOARD_SEQ NOT IN (
SELECT BOARD_SEQ FROM ( SELECT BOARD_SEQ FROM NMCP_BOARD_BAS WHERE BOARD_CTG_SEQ = 57 AND VIEW_YN = 'Y'
AND ( UPPER(BOARD_SUBJECT) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchNm}) || '%' || '%' ESCAPE '!' OR UPPER(BOARD_CONTENTS) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchNm}) || '%' || '%' ESCAPE '!')
) WHERE ROWNUM <= 10 )
AND ( REPLACE(UPPER(BOARD_SUBJECT),' ','') LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchNm}) || '%' || '%' ESCAPE '!' OR REPLACE(UPPER(BOARD_CONTENTS),' ','') LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchNm}) || '%' || '%' ESCAPE '!')

SELECT BOARD_SEQ , SBST_CTG , BOARD_SUBJECT , BOARD_HIT_CNT , BOARD_CONTENTS FROM NMCP_BOARD_BAS WHERE BOARD_CTG_SEQ = 57 AND VIEW_YN = 'Y' AND BOARD_SEQ NOT IN ( SELECT BOARD_SEQ FROM ( SELECT BOARD_SEQ FROM NMCP_BOARD_BAS WHERE BOARD_CTG_SEQ = 57 AND VIEW_YN = 'Y'
AND ( REPLACE(UPPER(BOARD_SUBJECT), ' ', '') LIKE '%' || REPLACE(UPPER(#{searchNm}), ' ', '') || '%' ESCAPE '!' OR REPLACE(UPPER(BOARD_CONTENTS), ' ', '') LIKE '%' || REPLACE(UPPER(#{searchNm}), ' ', '') || '%' ESCAPE '!' )
AND ROWNUM <= 10 ) )
AND ( REPLACE(UPPER(BOARD_SUBJECT), ' ', '') LIKE '%' || REPLACE(UPPER(#{searchNm}), ' ', '') || '%' ESCAPE '!' OR REPLACE(UPPER(BOARD_CONTENTS), ' ', '') LIKE '%' || REPLACE(UPPER(#{searchNm}), ' ', '') || '%' ESCAPE '!' )
ORDER BY CASE WHEN REPLACE(UPPER(BOARD_SUBJECT), ' ', '') LIKE '%' || REPLACE(UPPER(#{searchNm}), ' ', '') || '%' ESCAPE '!' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, BOARD_HIT_CNT DESC
SELECT BOARD_HIT_CNT FROM NMCP_BOARD_BAS WHERE 1=1 AND BOARD_SEQ = #{boardSeq}
